fields.label: Alert Email(s)
fields.description: Comma-separated email addresses for all system alerts: integration errors, low stock, and GSTR-1 reports

fields.label: Enable Daily Error Digest
fields.description: Send a daily email listing integration errors from the last 24 hours (runs at 8 AM)

fields.label: Enable Low Stock Alerts
fields.description: Send a daily email when items synced to OpenCart or Amazon drop below the threshold (runs at 8 AM)

fields.label: Enable Monthly GSTR-1 Report
fields.description: Send an HSN-wise GSTR-1 summary email on the 1st of each month for the previous month

fields.label: Low Stock Threshold
fields.description: Alert when available qty in sync warehouse drops to or below this value
